mapper.select: SELECT survey_template_id, company_id, name, stage, manager_only, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at, description, version, is_default, target_role FROM survey_templates WHERE survey_template_id = #{surveyTemplateId} AND company_id = #{companyId} LIMIT 1

select st.survey_template_id, st.company_id, st.name, coalesce(st.purpose, 'ONBOARDING_FEEDBACK') as purpose, st.stage, st.target_role, st.status, st.is_default, count(sq.survey_question_id) as question_count from survey_templates st left join survey_questions sq on sq.company_id = st.company_id and sq.survey_template_id = st.survey_template_id where st.company_id = #{companyId} and coalesce(st.purpose, 'ONBOARDING_FEEDBACK') = 'MANAGER_EVALUATION' and upper(st.stage) = 'COMPLETED' and upper(st.target_role) = 'MANAGER' and st.is_default = true and upper(st.status) = 'ACTIVE' group by st.survey_template_id, st.company_id, st.name, st.purpose, st.stage, st.target_role, st.status, st.is_default having count(sq.survey_question_id) > 0 order by st.created_at desc limit 1

select st.survey_template_id, st.company_id, st.name, coalesce(st.purpose, 'ONBOARDING_FEEDBACK') as purpose, st.stage, st.target_role, st.status, st.is_default, count(sq.survey_question_id) as question_count from survey_templates st left join survey_questions sq on sq.company_id = st.company_id and sq.survey_template_id = st.survey_template_id where st.company_id = #{companyId} and st.survey_template_id = #{surveyTemplateId} and coalesce(st.purpose, 'ONBOARDING_FEEDBACK') = 'MANAGER_EVALUATION' and upper(st.stage) = 'COMPLETED' and upper(st.target_role) = 'MANAGER' and upper(st.status) = 'ACTIVE' group by st.survey_template_id, st.company_id, st.name, st.purpose, st.stage, st.target_role, st.status, st.is_default having count(sq.survey_question_id) > 0 limit 1

select count(1) from survey_templates st where st.company_id = #{companyId} and coalesce(st.purpose, 'ONBOARDING_FEEDBACK') = 'MANAGER_EVALUATION' and upper(st.stage) = 'COMPLETED' and upper(st.target_role) = 'MANAGER'
